name: discovery-quality-gating
description: Implement candidate classification, admissibility gating, and LLM-assisted reranking for BuyAnything live vendor discovery

thresholds.description: Discovery candidates are classified and gated before normalization and row visibility
Organic discovery no longer defaults all results to official_site

signals.description: Location-sensitive discovery suppresses non-local candidates when stronger local matches exist
LLM reranking only affects candidates that already passed deterministic gates and falls back safely
Discovery audit logging explains acceptance, suppression, and persistence decisions

approval.change_reason: initial approval for discovery quality gating build-all effort
